objective: Implement V2.5 plan-to-execution handoff runtime for document-driven task graphs
tests_run: python -c "import json, pathlib; [print('OK ' + str(p)) for p in pathlib.Path('specs').glob('*.json') if json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) is not None]"
done_criteria: ProjectBrief, ContextBundle, and TaskGraph convert into RuntimeState
Generated task nodes convert into CodexWorkerInput packages
Document-driven graphs can run through Orchestrator dry-run execution
Release/GitHub evidence is recorded for the existing DONE gate
Relevant tests and contract checks pass
